00:53:06	Justin Traglia:	Replying to "Then what’s the poin..."

For p2p bids, this value must be zero. But if you receive a bid from elsewhere, it can be a non-zero value. In which case you are trusting that the builder will make the appropriate payment.
00:54:59	Justin Traglia:	One note, bid.value must come from the builder’s balance but bid.execution_payment could come from elsewhere.
01:00:46	Nico Flaig:	Barnabas tested lodestar circuit breaker already
01:00:55	potuz:	BTW Dima, we actually had this field outside of the signed part of the bid, it needs to be somewhere cause the builder needs to inform it to the proposer. We added it to the bid cause it can’t hurt, but it can easily be outside of the bid and kept offchain
